title: davallia polypodioides
intro: Davallia polypodioides, also known as the Rasp fern or Davallia fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Davalliaceae. Traditionally, Davallia polypodioides has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Davallia polypodioides is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions.
